title: fix: bump filippo.io/edwards25519 to v1.1.1 (CVE-2026-26958)
body:
## Description

Bumps the indirect dependency `filippo.io/edwards25519` from **v1.1.0 → v1.1.1** to remediate **CVE-2026-26958** (`GHSA-fw7p-63qq-7hpr`).

Hygiene bump only

## Changes

- `go.mod` / `go.sum`: `filippo.io/edwards25519 v1.1.0` → `v1.1.1` (still `// indirect`)
- Applied via `go get filippo.io/edwards25519@v1.1.1` + `go mod tidy`
- **No source changes.**

## Notes

## Issue reference

CVE-2026-26958 / GHSA-fw7p-63qq-7hpr

## Checklist

- [x] Code compiles correctly (`go mod verify` passes; no source changes)
- [x] Commit messages are signed-off (DCO)

files.patch:
@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ require (
 	codeberg.org/go-latex/latex v0.1.0 // indirect
 	codeberg.org/go-pdf/fpdf v0.10.0 // indirect
 	dubbo.apache.org/dubbo-go/v3 v3.0.3-0.20230118042253-4f159a2b38f3 // indirect
-	filippo.io/edwards25519 v1.1.0 // indirect
+	filippo.io/edwards25519 v1.1.1 // indirect
 	git.sr.ht/~sbinet/gg v0.6.0 // indirect
 	github.com/AthenZ/athenz v1.12.13 // indirect
 	github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go v68.0.0+incompatible // indirect
